reviews.comment:

Excellent service. You can get something to eat or drink there, everything is super clean.

reviews.comment:
Mientras esperaba al servicio de gomeria tome algo en el local de comida. Esta muy bueno el lugar!

(Translated by Google)
While waiting for the tire shop, I grabbed something to eat at the food stand. It's a really good place!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRdXN6MVNREAE

reviews.comment:
En el salon (shop), buena atención , con lo justa e indispensable,  ni más ni menos... en la playa lo mismo... para destacar, la limpieza de los baños, impecables.

(Translated by Google)
In the shop, the service was good, with just what was necessary, nothing more and nothing less... the same on the beach... to highlight, the cleanliness of the bathrooms, impeccable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNROG9QdDhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Se ha renovado el sector de lavado de autos. Sin embargo el servicio de limpieza interior y terminación continúa siendo bastante mediocre. Tiene mucho para mejorar. El bar ha sido renovado. Es más cómodo y luminoso que el anterior.

(Translated by Google)
The car wash area has been renovated. However, the interior cleaning and finishing service remains quite mediocre. There's a lot of room for improvement. The bar has been renovated. It's more comfortable and brighter than before.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURndTRpczVRRRAB
